title: Your Proposals
heading: Your Proposals
inset_text: For submission deadlines, please contact your local partnership and strategic overview officer.

labels.project: Enter a project number or name

new_proposal_guidance.link_text: Check the guidance on submitting a proposal before you enter any data into PAFS (opens in new window or tab).

pso_ea_block.info_text_1: To create a new EA-Led proposal please go to AMIS/:PD
pso_ea_block.info_text_2: RMA-led projects are to be created by RAM, by logging into PAFS.
